note_text:
Pt seen for wound eval. Diabetic Left plantar measures aprx 3.0 x 2.8cm, depth 1.1cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - R ankle 1.8x1.7, 0.6cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Mon.

Wound note - Leftplantar. Meas 3.0x2.8x1.1cm. None serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 49% gran, 51% slough. Periwound intact. Collagen dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Johansson notified.
